title: Molecular Observation Network (MONet)
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"46shk","text":"EMSL is leading the effort to develop a national network of environmental sampling and sensing sites to produce comprehensive molecular-level information on the composition and structure of soil, water, and resident microbial communities required to advance the span and accuracy of multiscale models of Earth systems.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"1ci4i","text":"Through the Molecular Observation Network (MONet), EMSL will collaborate with a broad range of partners managing an expanding network of selected natural, urban, and managed watershed, coastal, continental, and atmospheric sites, both experimental and observational. ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"7aj1i","text":"To establish MONet for the Biological and Environmental Research user community, research will focus on seven areas. Research focused under current development include:","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"940s9","text":"Establishing the supporting field and experimental networks,","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"c14sc","text":"Advancing methods for model–data exchange and multiscale modeling,","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"33j7k","text":"Automating organic matter and soil analysis,","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"8moo8","text":"Developing the next generation of rhizosphere sensors and other field sensors for plants, microbes, nutrients, biomarkers, and aerosols.","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"jro1","text":"The data and models generated through MONet will improve prediction of ecosystem function and response to disturbances, supporting the long-term U.S. Department of Energy goal of scientifically informed decision-making regarding the nation’s energy and environmental security and sustainability. ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"5929l","text":"For more information please visit: https://www.emsl.pnnl.gov/monet","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
creator: nicholas.sconzo
